title: Bounded halt-authority window mechanism
description: Wave 3 NIVO lane: implement a disabled-by-default halt_authority_window in runtime_policy.yaml so layer1/protocol validators can set operator-clearable halts only during a bounded active window, while inactive/expired windows preserve telemetry-only behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Window inactive or expired preserves current telemetry-only validator behavior.
Active window scoped to layer1/protocol writes an operator-clearable halt through halt_state.py when a validator violation fires.
Scope filtering prevents unrelated validators from halting.
Halt-or-would-halt decisions are logged with adjudication status pending.
Mechanism ships disabled; operator enablement is documented as a one-line action.
Focused tests and relevant suite checks pass.
